sourceAmbiguity: Sign-in uplift implementation belongs to adjacent frontend work.
decisionTaken: The SMS route exposes a sign-in-return state that restores add_detail inside the same shell.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The prompt requires same-shell return after sign-in uplift or step-up interruptions.
operationalRisk: A future auth redirect could bypass the local return route.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Connect the real auth callback to RecoveryContinuationToken.safeReturnPath.
